text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 46 

HTN_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the hypertension indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) hypertension (HTN; high blood pressure) indicator. The variable will be blank for 
beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG
